title: cybele gracilis
intro: Cybele gracilis, also known as the 'Queen of the Night' or 'Queen of the Valley', is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a species of passionflower (Passiflora) known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anxiolytic and a sedative, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cybele gracilis include its potential to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Cybele gracilis can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
